mapper.sql: Id, trasferimento_type, dosource_enum, from_do_item_inventory_id, doId, pcoId, pcoItem, sortNum, from_inventory_id, fromInventory_table_type, toInventory_id, toInventory_table_type, to_warehouse_code, to_qty, creator, cre_time, do_dbID, model_no, split_no, db_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_change_order_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_change_order_log (Id, trasferimento_type, dosource_enum, from_do_item_inventory_id, doId, pcoId, pcoItem, sortNum, from_inventory_id, fromInventory_table_type, toInventory_id, toInventory_table_type, to_warehouse_code, to_qty, creator, cre_time, do_dbID, model_no, split_no, db_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trasferimentoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dosourceEnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDoItemInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sortnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{frominventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toinventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{toinventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{doDbid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dbFlag,jdbcType=BIT})

update dbo.ops_change_order_log
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
trasferimento_type = #{record.trasferimentoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dosource_enum = #{record.dosourceEnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_do_item_inventory_id = #{record.fromDoItemInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
doId = #{record.doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pcoId = #{record.pcoid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pcoItem = #{record.pcoitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sortNum = #{record.sortnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
fromInventory_table_type = #{record.frominventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
toInventory_id = #{record.toinventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
toInventory_table_type = #{record.toinventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_warehouse_code = #{record.toWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_qty = #{record.toQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

do_dbID = #{record.doDbid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
db_flag = #{record.dbFlag,jdbcType=BIT},

trasferimento_type = #{trasferimentoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dosource_enum = #{dosourceEnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_do_item_inventory_id = #{fromDoItemInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
doId = #{doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

pcoItem = #{pcoitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sortNum = #{sortnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},

fromInventory_table_type = #{frominventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
toInventory_id = #{toinventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
toInventory_table_type = #{toinventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

to_qty = #{toQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},

model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
db_flag = #{dbFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
